    InitialMinDiff = Length, 
    
    % Start outer search loop (i=0)
    {FinalMin, Found} = search_outer(Nums, Length, 0, InitialMinDiff, false),
    
    if Found ->
        FinalMin;
        -1
    end.

% search_outer(Nums, Length, i, MinDiff, Found)
% Iterates through potential indices i where Nums[i] == 1
search_outer(_, Length, i, MinDiff, Found) when i >= Length ->
    {MinDiff, Found};

search_outer(Nums, Length, i, MinDiff, Found) ->
    H_i = Nums !! i,
    
    if H_i == 1 ->
        % Nums[i] == 1: Run inner search (j) starting at j=0
        {NewMinDiff, NewFound} = search_inner(Nums, Length, i, 0, MinDiff, Found),
        % Recurse for next i, carrying forward the best results from inner search
        search_outer(Nums, Length, i + 1, NewMinDiff, NewFound);
    else
        % Nums[i] != 1: Skip inner search, just continue outer loop
        search_outer(Nums, Length, i + 1, MinDiff, Found)
    end.

% search_inner(Nums, Length, i, j, MinDiff, Found)
% Iterates through potential indices j where Nums[j] == 2
search_inner(_, Length, i, j, MinDiff, Found) when j >= Length ->
    % Inner loop finished for the given i. Return current state.

        NewMinDiff = min(MinDiff, Diff),

        search_inner(Nums, Length, i, j + 1, MinDiff, Found)
